Package model

Class AccountCollection

java.lang.Object
model.AccountCollection
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AccountCollection extends Object implements Serializable
This class represents a collection of accounts for the Wordle game. It handles account management functions such as creating new accounts, logging in, and saving account information.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • leaderBoard

      public ArrayList<String> leaderBoard

  • Constructor Details

    • AccountCollection

      public AccountCollection()
      Constructs a new AccountCollection instance. Initializes the leader board and account map, and adds default accounts.

  • Method Details

    • accountExists

      public boolean accountExists(String username)
      Checks if an account with the specified username exists.
      Parameters:
      username - The username to check.
      Returns:
      true if an account with the given username exists, false otherwise.

    • createNewAccount

      public void createNewAccount(String username, String password)
      Creates a new account and adds it to the collection.
      Parameters:
      username - The username for the new account.
      password - The password for the new account.

    • login

      public boolean login(String username, String password)
      Attempts to log in with the specified username and password.
      Parameters:
      username - The username for login.
      password - The password for login.
      Returns:
      true if the login is successful, false otherwise.

    • isUsername

      public boolean isUsername(String username)
      Checks if the specified username is associated with an account.
      Parameters:
      username - The username to check.
      Returns:
      true if the username is associated with an account, false otherwise.

    • logout

      public void logout()
      Logs out the currently active account and saves its state.

    • activeAccount

      public WordleAccount activeAccount()
      Retrieves the currently active account.
      Returns:
      The currently active WordleAccount, or null if no account is active.

    • saveAccount

      public void saveAccount()
      Saves the current state of the AccountCollection to a file.

    • loadAccount

      public AccountCollection loadAccount()
      Loads the AccountCollection from a file if it exists, otherwise returns a new instance.
      Returns:
      The loaded AccountCollection if successful, or a new instance if no saved data is found.

    • getAccounts

      public Map<String,WordleAccount> getAccounts()
